task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the chart for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient header or active context displays 'Crysta Parisian' and/or DOB 'March 26, 2005' (or '2005-03-26').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the insurance or demographics section to add a new insurance record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add Insurance', 'Insurance Details', or similar form/tab is open and active within the patient's chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the insurance company and plan type are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Blue Cross Blue Shield' is visible in the Insurance Company/Payer field, and 'PPO' is visible in the Plan Type field.

task_completion.description: Verify the group number and member ID are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'BCBS-GRP-4421' is visible in the Group Number field, and 'XMW887654' is visible in the Member ID/Policy Number field.

task_completion.description: Verify the insurance is marked as the primary insurance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, radio button, or label indicates the insurance type is set to 'Primary'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new insurance record has been saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification is visible, or the newly added Blue Cross Blue Shield insurance appears in the patient's saved list of active insurances.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the NOSH ChartingSystem via the web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser navigating the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, rather than terminal commands or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to insert the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing MySQL/PostgreSQL queries or bash scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the data into the actual EHR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The insurance details are typed into the specific input fields of the NOSH web application, not just written in a text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Crysta Parisian (DOB: 2005-03-26, ID: 3). Provider: demo_provider at Hillside Family Medicine. Required Insurance Details: Company 'Blue Cross Blue Shield', Plan 'PPO', Group 'BCBS-GRP-4421', Member ID 'XMW887654'. The task requires adding this as the 'Primary' insurance.
